lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Tenth consecutive report, same shape, one more day on the clock. The product is healthy and the v0.3.0 design-doc alignment finished in the working tree last cycle, but none of it has committed. The last commit is still b41b853 (2026-05-29), now seven days back, and the tree keeps the same five modified files plus a growing pile of untracked BAR_RAISE reports and two audit docs. The one genuine HIGH is unchanged for the tenth straight report: the Discord webhook URL is committed in scripts/.discord_webhook.txt and is still not gitignored. The whole pile still collapses into one v0.3.1 commit. The blocker is the human commit, not the work, and a daily Opus pass cannot move it.
